summary: All steps complete. Established green baseline (7 existing tests), added test_update_task_tag_forwarded_to_interceptor (step-1), strengthened test_update_task_interceptor_error_returns_error_dict with error_type assertion (step-2), ran full 40-test suite (step-3). All pass. No production code changes needed.

All plan steps complete. pre-1: created fused_memory/utils/__init__.py. step-1: wrote 16 tests for validate_project_root/validate_project_id/require_project_root in test_validation.py (red). step-2: implemented utils/validation.py with all three functions (green, 16 tests). step-3: refactored tools.py to import from shared module; removed local _validate_project_id and _validate_project_root; removed now-unused os import. step-4: updated test_targeted.py — added project_root to 15 existing calls; added 2 new failing tests for ValueError behavior. step-5: updated targeted.py — added require_project_root import, removed =  default from both method signatures, replaced silent fallback with require_project_root(). Final: 77 tests pass (21 targeted + 16 validation + 40 health_endpoint).
